# cortexcloud_compliance_assessment_profile (Data Source)

Provides details about a Compliance Assessment Profile.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cortexcloud_compliance_assessment_profile" "existing" {
  id = "profile-123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `asset_group_id` (Number)
- `asset_group_name` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `insert_ts` (Number)
- `modified_by` (String)
- `modify_ts` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `report_frequency` (String)
- `report_targets` (List of String)
- `report_type` (String)
- `standard_id` (String)
- `standard_name` (String)
